$schema: Shared Patterns Registry — single source of truth for all reusable SCSS mixins and @arvo/utils logic shared across components. The orchestrator's pre-flight check reads this file to determine whether a pattern is ready before allowing the component pipeline to proceed.

form-input-base.description: Base layout, cursor, and font styles shared by all form input components

form-input-animated-border.description: Animated bottom border that scales on hover and thickens on focus, with error/readonly variants

form-input-hover-bg.description: Subtle background change on hover for non-disabled, non-readonly inputs

form-input-disabled-bg.description: Disabled background and cursor styles for form inputs

form-input-text-colors.description: Text, placeholder, and selection color tokens for form inputs

form-label.description: Form field label with two sizes (sm/lg), disabled state, and required asterisk indicator

react.note: Internal component — not re-exported from @arvo/react public index

form-char-counter.description: Character counter display showing current/max length with zero-padded formatting

inline-alert.description: Compact icon + message inline alert used for validation errors, warnings, success, and info feedback. Also provides an error tooltip icon variant for form inputs.

loading-overlay-a.description: Simple shimmer overlay that covers the entire element (Pattern A for atomic components)

loading-skeleton-b.description: Structured skeleton that mimics content layout (Pattern B for complex components)

indicator.description: Small status badge (dot/square) positioned at the top-right of its parent. Indicates unsaved changes (warning amber circle), new notifications (negative red square), or unread items (theme color square). Available in sm (6px) and lg (10px) sizes. Has a 1px layer-01 border ring for visual separation from the underlying surface.

react.note: Internal component — not re-exported from @arvo/react public index

indicator.referenceCSS: .arvo-indicator { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; width: var(--arvo-indicator-size); height: var(--arvo-indicator-size); border: 1px solid var(--arvo-color-s-layer-01); position: absolute; z-index: 1; } .arvo-indicator--unsaved { border-radius: $arvo-radius-circle; background: var(--arvo-color-s-warning-static); } .arvo-indicator--new { background: var(--arvo-color-s-negative-static); } .arvo-indicator--unread { background: var(--arvo-color-s-theme); } .arvo-indicator--sm { --arvo-indicator-size: 6px; } .arvo-indicator--lg { --arvo-indicator-size: 10px; }

list-item.description: Base layout, typography, interactive states, and leading content slots for list/menu items

list-group.description: Section headers and dividers for grouped lists, menus, and dropdown panels

form-input-default-width.description: Sets a consistent default width (300px) on form input components. Exposes --arvo-form-input-width CSS variable and a width prop (CSS value string). fullWidth is shorthand for width: 100%.

dnd-sortable-list.description: Vertical sortable list with pointer and keyboard reorder, cross-group policy, ghost placeholder, drop-line indicator, and live-region announcements

resize-handle.description: Pointer-driven panel resize with corner handles, viewport-aware clamping, and directional auto-hide

form-input-actions-overlay.description: Positions right-side dynamic actions (clear, error icon, shortcut indicator) absolutely within the field so they do not shift the component width. Dynamically sets padding-right on the input via --arvo-form-input-pad-r CSS variable measured by ResizeObserver. When actions are hidden, padding resets so text fills the full width.
